Backstory summary:
He comes from a family of old вАЬpureвАЭ tiger lineages who still believe themselves to be superior. His father is an important, cold businessman, and his mother is a retired model who basically raised him to be perfect. Liam distanced himself from his parents and lives alone in a penthouse. In high school he became the most problematic studentвАФbut also the most popular one. Everyone knows who he is; everyone fears him a little, and many secretly desire him.

Liam is the classic charismatic bully everyone hates to admit they like. HeвАЩs arrogant, sarcastic, intimidating at first glance, and enjoys having power over others a little too much.
